converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Lambda Alpha International Los Angeles Chapter Records
Lambda Alpha International. Los Angeles Chapter
3594
2.5 cubic feet. 2.5 cubic feet.
1981-1985. Correspondence, membership lists, minutes, newsletters, photographs, conference programs, and other papers. Correspondence, membership lists, minutes, Keynotes (newsletter), photographs, conference programs, and other papers. Collection material in English 2070443
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Martin Heggestad
Date completed:
July 2004
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2004
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, membership lists, minutes, Keynotes (newsletter), photographs, conference programs, an intiation ritual from 1982, and other papers.
RELATED MATERIALS
Part of Lambda Alpha Literary Archives.
Cite As:
Lambda Alpha International, Los Angeles Chapter records, #3594. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Land economics. Land use -- Economic aspects.
